nasb.text: So Esther was taken to King Ahasuerus to his royal palace in the tenth month which is the month Tebeth, in the seventh year of his reign.

esv.text: And when Esther was taken to King Ahasuerus, into his royal palace, in the tenth month, which is the month of Tebeth, in the seventh year of his reign,

cnv.text: 亞哈隨魯王執政第七年十月，就是提別月，以斯帖被帶進王宮去見亞哈隨魯王。

ccb.text: 亚哈随鲁王执政第七年十月，即提别月，以斯帖被带进宫中见王。
